title: Checking for Spooler & WebDav
html:
Checking for Spooler & WebDav

Checking if the Spooler Service is Running

nxc smb <ip> -u <username> -p <password> -M spooler

Checking if the WebDav Service is Running

nxc smb <ip> -u <username> -p <password> -M webdav
